mapper.select:
select id, bar_code, name, color_code, model, unit_id, oper_time, commodity_unit, batch_number, expiration_date, type, sum(basic_number) total_num from (select di.batch_number id, me.bar_code, m.name, m.color_code, m.model, m.unit_id, me.commodity_unit, di.batch_number,di.expiration_date, dh.oper_time, di.sn_list, di.basic_number*(case
when ((dh.type='入库' and di.sn_list = #{allocationId}) or (dh.type='出库' and di.material_type = #{allocationId})) then 1 when (dh.type='出库' and di.sn_list = #{allocationId}) then -1 end) as basic_number,
(case when (di.sn_list = #{allocationId} and di.depot_id != 24) then '正常' else '隔离' end) as type from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_depot_item di on dh.id=di.header_id left join jsh_material m on m.id=di.material_id and ifnull(m.delete_flag, '0') != '1' left join jsh_material_extend me on me.material_id=m.id and ifnull(me.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where (di.sn_list = #{allocationId} or di.material_type = #{allocationId}) and di.delete_flag!=1) tb group by bar_code, batch_number, type order by oper_time asc

select sum(basic_number) from (select di.basic_number*(case
when ((dh.type='入库' and di.sn_list = #{allocationId}) or (dh.type='出库' and di.material_type = #{allocationId})) then 1 when (dh.type='出库' and di.sn_list = #{allocationId}) then -1 end) as basic_number from jsh_depot_item di left join jsh_depot_head dh on dh.id=di.header_id and ifnull(dh.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where (di.sn_list = #{allocationId} or di.material_type = #{allocationId}) and ifnull(di.delete_flag, '0') != '1') tb
